text.title: AWS Serverless API (Lambda + API Gateway + DynamoDB + EventBridge) Failure Modes
text.summary: 4 antipatterns observed in real deployments. Each pairs symptom + root cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: Lambda costs 20% more than necessary; CPU-bound tasks 10-15% slower.
antipattern.root-cause: Default x86_64 left in place from template.
antipattern.fix: Switch architectures to ['arm64']. Rebuild deps with native arm64.

antipattern.symptom: App vulnerable to credentialed-CORS attacks; security audit blocks launch.
antipattern.root-cause: Author copy-pasted dev config to prod.
antipattern.fix: Explicit allow_origins list. Add CI check rejecting cors_origins containing '*'.

antipattern.symptom: Bot scan triggers 10k Lambda concurrent executions; account-level limit hit; legit traffic fails.
antipattern.fix: Set throttling_burst_limit + throttling_rate_limit to capacity. Add 429 alarm.

antipattern.symptom: Stage URL hardcoded in client; redeploy changes it; client breaks.
antipattern.fix: Provision domain + ACM cert. Map stage to custom domain. CNAME from DNS.
